title: LiteLLM Proxy Config
description: Configuration file for LiteLLM AI Gateway (Proxy). Reference: https://docs.litellm.ai/docs/proxy/config_settings

environment_variables.description: Environment variables to set for the proxy. Keys are variable names, values are strings. Use os.environ/<VAR> syntax to reference existing env vars.

model_list.description: List of model configurations available through the proxy.

model_name.description: The name/alias for this model that clients will use in API requests.

litellm_params.description: Parameters passed to litellm.completion(). Must include 'model' at minimum.

model.description: The model identifier in provider/model format, e.g. 'openai/gpt-4', 'azure/my-deployment', 'anthropic/claude-3-opus-20240229'.

api_key.description: API key for this model. Can use os.environ/<VAR> syntax.

api_base.description: Base URL for the model's API endpoint.

timeout.description: Request timeout in seconds for this specific model.

max_retries.description: Maximum number of retries for this model.

tpm.description: Tokens per minute limit for this deployment.

rpm.description: Requests per minute limit for this deployment.

input_cost_per_token.description: Custom input cost per token (overrides default).

output_cost_per_token.description: Custom output cost per token (overrides default).

aws_access_key_id.description: AWS access key for Bedrock models.

aws_secret_access_key.description: AWS secret key for Bedrock models.

vertex_project.description: GCP project ID for Vertex AI models.

vertex_location.description: GCP region for Vertex AI models.

vertex_credentials.description: Path to GCP service account JSON for Vertex AI.

id.description: Unique identifier for this model entry.

max_tokens.description: Maximum output tokens for the model.

max_input_tokens.description: Maximum input tokens for the model.

base_model.description: Base model name for cost tracking, e.g. 'gpt-4-1106-preview'.

litellm_settings.description: Settings passed to the litellm module. Controls logging, caching, fallbacks, networking, and more.

callbacks.description: Callbacks that run on both success and failure, e.g. ['otel', 'langfuse'].

service_callbacks.description: System health monitoring - logs redis/postgres failures, e.g. ['datadog', 'prometheus'].

turn_off_message_logging.description: If true, prevents messages and responses from being logged to callbacks. Request metadata is still logged.

modify_params.description: If true, allows modifying request parameters before sending to the LLM provider.

enable_preview_features.description: If true, enables preview features such as Azure O1 models with streaming.

redact_user_api_key_info.description: If true, redacts user API key info (hashed token, user_id, team_id) from logs.

langfuse_default_tags.description: Default tags for Langfuse logging, e.g. ['cache_hit', 'proxy_base_url', 'user_api_key_alias'].

request_timeout.description: LLM request timeout in seconds. Default: 6000.

force_ipv4.description: If true, forces IPv4 for all LLM requests.

set_verbose.description: [DEPRECATED] Use --debug/--detailed_debug CLI flags or LITELLM_LOG env var instead.

json_logs.description: If true, logs will be in JSON format.

default_fallbacks.description: Fallback models if a specific model group is misconfigured, e.g. ['claude-opus'].

mcp_aliases.description: Maps friendly aliases to MCP server names. Only the first alias for each server is used.

ttl.description: Time-to-live for cached items in seconds.

mode.description: Cache mode. 'default_off' requires opt-in per call.

gcs_path_service_account.description: Path to GCS service account JSON.

qdrant_semantic_cache_embedding_model.description: Embedding model for Qdrant semantic cache.

qdrant_semantic_cache_vector_size.description: Vector size for Qdrant semantic cache.

disable_end_user_cost_tracking.description: If true, turns off end user cost tracking on prometheus metrics and spend logs.

disable_end_user_cost_tracking_prometheu.description: If true, turns off end user cost tracking on prometheus metrics only.

disable_add_transform_inline_image_block.description: For Fireworks AI - if true, turns off auto-add of #transform=inline to image URLs.

use_chat_completions_url_for_anthropic_m.description: If true, routes /v1/messages through chat/completions instead of the Responses API.

disable_hf_tokenizer_download.description: If true, defaults to the OpenAI tokenizer for all models (including HuggingFace).

enable_json_schema_validation.description: If true, enables JSON schema validation for all requests.

enable_key_alias_format_validation.description: If true, validates key_alias format on /key/generate and /key/update.

disable_copilot_system_to_assistant.description: [DEPRECATED] GitHub Copilot API now supports system prompts.

message_logging.description: If true, enables message logging for OTEL.

general_settings.description: General proxy settings including auth, database, alerting, and operational controls.

completion_model.description: Default model for completions when 'model' is not specified in the request.

store_prompts_in_spend_logs.description: If true, stores prompts and responses in spend logs table.

forward_client_headers_to_llm_api.description: If true, forwards client headers (x-* and anthropic-beta) to the backend LLM.

disable_spend_logs.description: If true, turns off writing each transaction to the database.

disable_spend_updates.description: If true, turns off all spend updates to the DB including key/user/team spend.

disable_master_key_return.description: If true, turns off returning master key on UI (/user/info endpoint).

disable_retry_on_max_parallel_request_li.description: If true, turns off retries when max parallel request limit is reached.

disable_reset_budget.description: If true, turns off reset budget scheduled task.

disable_adding_master_key_hash_to_db.description: If true, turns off storing master key hash in DB.

disable_responses_id_security.description: If true, disables response ID security checks.

enable_jwt_auth.description: If true, allows proxy admin to auth via JWT tokens with 'litellm_proxy_admin' in claims.

enforce_user_param.description: If true, requires all OpenAI endpoint requests to have a 'user' param.

reject_clientside_metadata_tags.description: If true, rejects requests with client-side 'metadata.tags'.

allowed_routes.description: List of allowed proxy API routes (currently JWT-Auth only).

master_key.description: The master key for the proxy.

database_connection_timeout.description: Database connection timeout in seconds. Default: 60.

allow_requests_on_db_unavailable.description: If true, allows requests when DB is unreachable. Only use in VPC deployments.

max_parallel_requests.description: Max parallel requests allowed per deployment.

global_max_parallel_requests.description: Max parallel requests allowed on the proxy overall.

infer_model_from_keys.description: If true, infers the model from the provided keys.

background_health_checks.description: If true, enables background health checks.

health_check_interval.description: Interval for health checks in seconds.

health_check_details.description: If false, hides health check details (e.g. remaining rate limit).

alert_types.description: Control list of alert types to send to Slack.

alert_to_webhook_url.description: Map alert types to webhook URLs.

use_client_credentials_pass_through_rout.description: If true, uses client credentials for all pass-through routes (/vertex-ai, /bedrock).

enforced_params.description: [Enterprise] Params that must be included in all requests.

enable_oauth2_proxy_auth.description: [Enterprise] If true, enables OAuth2.0 proxy authentication.

use_x_forwarded_for.description: If true, uses X-Forwarded-For header for client IP.

service_account_settings.description: Settings that only apply to service account keys.

image_generation_model.description: Default model for image generation (ignores model set in request).

store_model_in_db.description: If true, stores model + credential info in the DB.

supported_db_objects.description: Fine-grained control over which object types to load from DB when store_model_in_db is true.

user_mcp_management_mode.description: Controls MCP dashboard visibility for non-admins.

maximum_spend_logs_retention_period.description: Max time to retain spend logs before deletion, e.g. '30d'.

maximum_spend_logs_retention_interval.description: Interval for spend log cleanup task, e.g. '1d'.

max_request_size_mb.description: Max request size in MB. Requests above this are rejected.

max_response_size_mb.description: Max response size in MB. LLM responses above this are not sent.

proxy_budget_rescheduler_min_time.description: Min seconds between budget reset checks. Default: 597.

proxy_budget_rescheduler_max_time.description: Max seconds between budget reset checks. Default: 605.

proxy_batch_write_at.description: Seconds before batch writing spend logs to DB. Default: 10.

proxy_batch_polling_interval.description: Seconds to wait before polling a batch for completion. Default: 6000.

allowed_ips.description: List of IPs allowed to access the proxy.

embedding_model.description: Default model for embeddings (ignores model set in request).

default_team_disabled.description: If true, users cannot create 'personal' keys (keys with no team_id).

key_management_settings.description: Settings for key management system (AWS KMS, Azure Key Vault, etc.).

user_api_key_cache_ttl.description: Time (seconds) to cache user API keys in memory.

disable_prisma_schema_update.description: If true, turns off automatic schema updates to DB.

litellm_key_header_name.description: Custom header name for passing LiteLLM keys.

custom_sso.description: Path to Python file implementing custom SSO logic.

allow_client_side_credentials.description: If true, allows passing client-side credentials to the proxy.

admin_only_routes.description: [Enterprise] Routes only accessible to admin users.

use_azure_key_vault.description: If true, loads keys from Azure Key Vault.

use_google_kms.description: If true, loads keys from Google KMS.

spend_report_frequency.description: How often to send spend reports, e.g. '1d', '7d', '30d'.

ui_access_mode.description: Restricts UI access. 'admin_only' limits to admin users.

forward_openai_org_id.description: If true, forwards OpenAI Organization ID to the backend LLM call.

router_settings.description: Router settings for load balancing, routing strategy, retries, and fallbacks. Settings here override litellm_settings.

redis_host.description: Redis host for shared TPM/RPM tracking across proxy instances.

redis_url.description: Redis URL. Note: known performance issue with Redis URL.

enable_pre_call_checks.description: If true, checks if a call is within the model's context window before making the call.

allowed_fails.description: Number of failures allowed before cooling down a model.

cooldown_time.description: Duration (seconds) to cooldown a model after exceeding allowed failures.

disable_cooldowns.description: If true, disables cooldowns for all models.

enable_tag_filtering.description: If true, enables tag-based routing for requests.

tag_filtering_match_any.description: Tag matching behavior. true: match ANY tag; false: match ALL tags.

retry_policy.description: Retry policy for different exception types.

allowed_fails_policy.description: Allowed failures per error type before cooling down a deployment.

content_policy_fallbacks.description: Fallback models for content policy violations.

fallbacks.description: Fallback models for all error types.

context_window_fallbacks.description: Fallback models for context window violations.

default_fallbacks.description: Fallbacks to try if no model group-specific fallbacks are defined.

num_retries.description: Number of retries for a request. Default: 3.

timeout.description: Default timeout for a request in seconds. Default: 600.

stream_timeout.description: Default timeout for streaming requests. Falls back to 'timeout' value.

max_fallbacks.description: Maximum number of fallbacks to try. Default: 5.

default_max_parallel_requests.description: Default max parallel requests per deployment.

polling_interval.description: Queue polling frequency in seconds (scheduler_acompletion only). Default: 0.003.

default_litellm_params.description: Default litellm params added to all requests (e.g. temperature, max_tokens).

debug_level.description: Debug level for the router logging. Default: INFO.

client_ttl.description: TTL for cached clients in seconds. Default: 3600.

cache_kwargs.description: Additional keyword arguments for cache initialization.

routing_strategy_args.description: Additional args for the routing strategy.

caching_groups.description: Model groups for caching across model groups.

cache_responses.description: If true, caches LLM responses. Default: false.

set_verbose.description: [DEPRECATED] If true, sets logging to verbose.

retry_after.description: Seconds to wait before retrying. Default: 0. Overridden by x-retry-after.

provider_budget_config.description: Provider budget configuration, e.g. $100/day to OpenAI.

optional_pre_call_checks.description: Pre-call checks to add to the router.

deployment_affinity_ttl_seconds.description: TTL (seconds) for user-key to deployment affinity mapping. Default: 3600.

ignore_invalid_deployments.description: If true, ignores invalid deployments. Default for proxy: true.

search_tools.description: Search tool configurations for Search API integration.

guardrail_list.description: Guardrail configurations for guardrail load balancing.

assistant_settings.description: Settings for the OpenAI Assistants API integration.

guardrails.description: Guardrail configurations for content filtering and safety.
